title: GAIA Mobile Adapter Output — canonical normalized result
description: Canonical JSON shape produced by normalize-adapter-output.sh from the per-framework output formats (JUnit XML, JSON, xcresult). Defined by E74-S9 / AC7. Consumers (review skills, CI dashboards) read this shape, never the framework-native output.

adapter.description: Adapter name (e.g., detox, maestro, appium, xcuitest, espresso). Matches the manifest filename stem.

framework.description: Test framework label. Equivalent to adapter for dynamic adapters; useful for normalized cross-adapter reporting.

exit_code.description: Exit code returned by the underlying test runner.

duration_ms.description: Total wall-clock duration of the test run in milliseconds.
